'''Light battle armor''' was a type of armor commonly used in the galaxy during the [[Jedi Civil War]] and [[Dark Wars]]. The armor provide decent protection for a relatively low cost, and was suitable for both [[Gender/Legends|males]] and females. It was considered excellent protection for entrenched [[Troop/Legends|troops]] or guards. However, this protection came at a cost of mobility, limiting its uses by rapidly advancing [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]]. Still, it provided more mobility than full [[battle armor]]. The armor was used by many soldiers in the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and local [[Militia/Legends|militias]], and was available from many vendors across [[The galaxy/Legends|the Galaxy]]. It was also used by other individuals, such as [[Gadon Thek]] of the [[Hidden Beks]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]].<ref name="KOTOR 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:KOTOR1LightBattleArmorIcon.png|thumb|left|50px|The KotOR I in-game icon]]
[[File:KOTOR2LightBattleArmorIcon.png|thumb|left|50px|The KotOR II in-game icon]]
Light battle armor first appeared in the [[2003]]<ref name="KOTOR 1 Date">{{SW|url=news/kotor-galaxy-of-heroes|text=BioWare and Capital Games on Bringing ''KotOR'' Fan Favorites into ''Galaxy of Heroes''|nolive=1}}</ref> [[roleplaying game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]],''<ref name="KOTOR 1" /> developed by [[BioWare]].<ref name="BioWare">{{WebCite|url=https://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-knights-of-the-old-republic|text=Star Wars Knights of the Old Republic|archivedate=20200205212954}}</ref> The armor later appeared in the [[2004]]<ref name="KOTOR 2 Date">{{GameSpot|url=star-wars-knights-of-the-old-republic-ii-the-sit|text=''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II - Rise of the Sith Lords''}}</ref> sequel, ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'',<ref name="KOTOR 2" /> developed by [[Obsidian Entertainment]].<ref name="KOTOR 2 Date" />

Due to the randomized vendors and drops in ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords,'' the armor does not necessarily appear in the game. The vendors with a chance to own the item are: [[Samhan Dobo]] on [[Telos IV]], [[Oondar]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], [[Kex]] on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]], [[Margar]] and [[Gegorran]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], and [[Adum Larp]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="KOTOR 2" /> In ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic,'' the vendors have set items, and the armor can always be bought from them.<ref name="KOTOR 1" />

The item's in-game description reads: "Providing solid protection for a minimal cost, this armor is excellent for entrenched troops or guards. A force on the move, however, may find it somewhat constricting."<ref name="KOTOR 1" />
